summary: Request to support the newly proposed HTTP QUERY method.
expected_behavior: Support the newly proposed QUERY HTTP method.
actual_behavior: Requests supports arbitrary HTTP verbs through the requests.request() API, but the issue states that using this approach has a caveat regarding redirections.
affected_area: requests.request() API and HTTP QUERY method
